rationale: Frontmatter front-loads intent ('Enable user-driven content moderation with comprehensive flagging capabilities'), 0 interleaved code blocks, AmityContentFlagReason and MessageRepository used consistently, in llms.txt — held from 5 by lack of API-named headings ('## MessageRepository.flagMessage()', '## MessageRepository.unflagMessage()').
suggestions: Add API-named headings for flagMessage(), unflagMessage(), and isFlaggedByMe() to enable canonical anchor links.
The description could be sharper: 'Flag, unflag, and check flag status on messages using MessageRepository.flagMessage() across all four platforms.'
